caption: The video features two men standing in front of a display board for AlphaSzenszor Inc., which showcases information about typical gas sensor attributes. The man on the right, who appears to be speaking, is wearing a gray polo shirt and has a name tag. He seems to be explaining or presenting something related to the content on the board behind him. The man on the left, dressed in a button-up shirt, listens attentively. The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the display board and a table with some materials, including a brochure with a QR code. The setting suggests a professional environment, possibly a trade show or an exhibition booth.
